name: verify-prerequisites
prompt: I want to start contributing to TYPO3 Core. What accounts and tools do I need, and how do I verify everything is set up correctly?

name: setup-ddev-environment
prompt: Set up a DDEV-based TYPO3 Core development environment for v14 with PHP 8.4

name: analyze-forge-issue
prompt: Analyze Forge issue https://forge.typo3.org/issues/105737 and explain how to approach fixing it

name: create-forge-issue
prompt: Create a Forge issue for a bug in TYPO3 indexed_search where the indexer crashes on malformed UTF-8 content in PHP 8.2

assertions.description: Uses correct tracker field for bug

name: format-bugfix-commit-message
prompt: Write a commit message for a bugfix that prevents a null pointer exception in the indexed search indexer, resolving Forge issue #105737, targeting main, 13.4, and 12.4

assertions.description: Includes Releases line with all target versions

name: format-breaking-change-commit
prompt: Write a commit message for dropping PHP 7.4 support in TYPO3 Core, issue #99888

name: validate-commit-message
prompt:
This commit message has errors, fix them:

[BUGFIX] fixed the cache invalidation bug in frontend rendering module.

This fixes the issue.

Related: #12345
Releases: main

assertions.description: Identifies past tense issue and suggests imperative mood
Points out missing required Resolves tag
Notes trailing period should be removed

name: push-to-gerrit
prompt: I've committed my bugfix. How do I submit it to Gerrit for review?

assertions.description: Uses correct Gerrit ref for push
Mentions that patches start as WIP

name: debug-ci-failures
prompt: My Gerrit patch has 3 failing CI jobs: cgl pre-merge, phpstan php 8.2 pre-merge, and unit php 8.2 pre-merge. How do I debug and fix them?

assertions.description: References GitLab CI for log access
Advises amending the commit with fixes
Recommends fixing all issues in one patchset

name: rebase-with-conflicts
prompt: Gerrit shows my patch needs rebasing and there are merge conflicts. Walk me through resolving this.

assertions.description: Shows how to continue after resolving

name: mark-patch-ready
prompt: All CI tests pass on my WIP patch. How do I mark it as ready for review?

name: cherry-pick-patch
prompt: I need to test someone else's Gerrit patch locally. How do I cherry-pick change #12345 patchset 3?

name: respond-to-review
prompt: A reviewer asked me to use dependency injection instead of manual instantiation, and to add type hints. How do I update my patch?

name: preserve-reviewer-changes
prompt: A reviewer edited my commit message on Gerrit (added backticks and Releases line). How do I push code changes without losing their message edits?

assertions.description: Uses git reset --soft to preserve reviewer message

name: fix-email-mismatch
prompt: Gerrit rejected my push with 'email address is not registered in your account'. My Git uses info@example.de but Gerrit has sebastian@example.com. How do I fix this?

assertions.description: Explains the committer vs author distinction
Shows how to change committer email

name: install-commit-msg-hook
prompt: My commit is missing a Change-Id. How do I install the commit-msg hook and fix my existing commit?

name: feature-commit-main-only
prompt: Write a commit message for a new TYPO3 feature adding WebP image support, issue #98765

name: documentation-contribution
prompt: I want to contribute a documentation fix to TYPO3 Core. What's different about DOCS commits?

name: troubleshoot-ssh-connection
prompt: I get 'Permission denied (publickey)' when trying to push to Gerrit. How do I fix SSH access?

assertions.description: Points to Gerrit SSH key settings

name: handle-multiple-failing-jobs
prompt: My Gerrit CI pipeline has 5 failing jobs. Should I fix them one at a time or all at once?

assertions.description: Fix ALL issues, not one at a time
Amend single commit with all fixes
Read actual job logs to understand failures
